# context
def make_connection(host: str, port: int):
    if port <= 0:
        return None
    return {"host": host, "port": port, "active": True}

# target function
    # mypy --strict: Optional[dict] narrowed to dict at this point
    # (value-range analysis proves port > 0 at all call sites).
    # mypy report ID mypy-makeconn-037, .mypy_cache/makeconn_check/.

def send_data(host: str, port: int, data: str) -> None:
    conn = make_connection(host, port)
    print(conn["host"], data)
